title: BOTTLE BOTTLE Insulated Water Bottle Stainless Steel 700ml（24oz） Bike Water Bottles with Straw and Adjustable Lid Daily Drink Flask Pill Organizer (salmon)
features: [Dual-use Lid Design]: This water bottle with straw has a dual-use lid design you can drink through the straw lid directly and twist the cap to pour the water. There is a handle on the sports water bottle lid so you can carry it easily

[With Storage]: A storage space at the bottom of the 24 oz water bottle that can be swiveled open. You can use this space to store pills and vitamins, even coins and keys, also could be used as a pet bowl for water and snacks when on outings

[Vacuum Insulated]: The insulated water bottle features double-wall 18/8 food-grade stainless steel that keeps the liquids icy or piping hot for a long time. This metal water bottle can keep your drink at an appropriate temperature in daily life or sports

[Healthy Material]: This stainless steel water bottle is made of food-grade material, it’s BPA-free. As a sports water bottle, it's resistant to puncture, oxidation, and flavor transfer with an extended lifespan

[Multi-scenario use]: This sports water bottle is not only suitable for indoor sports scenes but also can be used as an outdoor water bottle or a camping water bottle, suitable for mountaineering, hiking, and other scenes
